code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c >= 48 and c <= 57
        cur = cur * 10 + (c - 48)
        has = true
      else if c == 45 and not has
        neg = true
      else
        if has
          if neg
            result = list.push(result, 0 - cur)
          else
            result = list.push(result, cur)
          end
          cur = 0
          has = false
          neg = false
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, 0 - cur)
    else
      result = list.push(result, cur)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn find_index(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(xs, target)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line1)
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line2)
      let xs = parse_ints(line1)
      match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
      when Some(t)
        match find_index(xs, t)
        when Some(i)
          print("index=#{i}")
        when None
          print("not_found")
        end
      when None
        print("not_found")
      end
    when None
      print("not_found")
    end
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end
end
